name: delete_feishu_document_blocks
description: Deletes a consecutive range of blocks from a Feishu document identified by startIndex (inclusive) and endIndex (exclusive). For Feishu wiki links (https://xxx.feishu.cn/wiki/xxx), use get_feishu_document_info first to obtain the documentId, then use that ID for editing operations.

documentId.description:
Document ID or URL (required). Supports the following formats:
1. Standard document URL: https://xxx.feishu.cn/docs/xxx or https://xxx.feishu.cn/docx/xxx
2. Direct document ID: e.g., JcKbdlokYoPIe0xDzJ1cduRXnRf

parentBlockId.description: Parent block ID (required). The block ID whose direct children will be operated on, without any URL prefix. For root-level operations, use the document ID as parentBlockId.

startIndex.description:
Start of the target range within the direct children of `parentBlockId` (0-based, title block excluded).
0 = first content block; max = children.length - 1.
Example: to target blocks at positions 2, 3, 4 → startIndex=2.

endIndex.description:
End of the target range (exclusive) within the direct children of `parentBlockId` (title block excluded).
Must satisfy endIndex > startIndex.
Example: to delete blocks at positions 2, 3, 4 → startIndex=2, endIndex=5; single block at 2 → startIndex=2, endIndex=3.
